list.expr: {container="radarr"}|="DownloadService" | pattern `[<level>] <service>: Report for <Movie> sent to Transmission from indexer <indexer>. <file>`
list.name: Transmission - Download Start (Movies)

target.expr: sum by(pod)( kube_pod_info{created_by_kind!="Job"} AND ON (pod, namespace) kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"} == 1)

spec.description: High-level view of Kubernetes cluster - useful for monitoring, alerting and troubleshooting.

panels.description:
UPS runtime

Calculation comes from:
Backup Time (in hours) = Battery Capacity (in Ah) X Input voltage (V) / Total Load (in Watts)

Calculation divided by 2 for conservative estimation.
panels.title: 🏃🏼‍♀️ Runtime

targets.expr:
sum by (node) (rate((coredns_cache_requests_total{container="cloudflared"}[1m]))
  * on(namespace, pod)
    group_left(node)
    kube_pod_info)*60

panels.description: List of logs in the cluster with "error" in the message

panels.description: Delta for the amount of data (increase or decrease)

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h])
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h])
  )
)
-
(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
  )
)

panels.title: Postgres 24h Egress Change

panels.description: Percentage trend for egress (positive is bad, negative is good)

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by (project) (
      increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h])
      +
      increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h])
    )
    -
    sum by (project) (
      increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
      +
      increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
    )
  )
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
  ),
  10 * 1024 * 1024  # 10 MB floor
)

panels.title: Postgres Egress Percent Trend

panels.description:
Calculates rate at which CPU throttling periods occur for each namespace over last 1 minute.

CPU throttling happens when containers exceed their allocated quota.

Example: rate of 0.05, means throttling occurring 0.05 periods per second - or once every 20 seconds (on average).
panels.title: CPU Throttled Periods (Pod)

panels.description:
Calculates CPU usage for each pod

CPU throttling happens when containers exceed their allocated quota.

Example: rate of 0.05, means throttling occurring 0.05 periods per second - or once every 20 seconds (on average).
panels.title: CPU Usage (Pod)
